notice: Pharmacogenomic reference tables from CPIC (CC0), for genes CPIC rates level A. Stored as allele functions plus function-pair rules rather than the full diplotype expansion, which is combinatorial and derivable. A diplotype call requires every defining position listed here; any missing position makes the result indeterminate, never approximate. Phenotypes are surfaced as such — this tool does not restate CPIC's dosing recommendations.

phenotypeRules.phenotype: normal risk of aminoglycoside-induced hearing loss
